judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent misinterpreted the query_db output (a list of article dictionaries) as a nested dictionary with 'query_db_response' and 'results' in the final execute_python call, defaulted to an empty dataset, and thus returned "No sports articles found," instead of computing the longest sports description.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
Using the articles collection data (function-call-17926017845204998208), the agent’s execute_python step (function-call-12701701757036768091) applied a naive keyword-based “sports” classifier that misidentified a non-sports article and then selected it as having the longest description, yielding "IBM to market Sybase Linux database" instead of the true sports article "The Rundown".
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After fetching article titles and descriptions from the articles collection, the agent filtered for sports by checking whether 'sport' appeared as a substring in the title or description, leading it to return "No sports articles found" instead of properly identifying sports articles and selecting the one with the longest description (e.g., "The Rundown").
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent queried the articles but repeatedly misparsed the tool output (treating the stored list of article dicts as a dict with a 'query_db_response'/'results' structure), causing TypeErrors in multiple execute_python calls and ultimately returning a fallback "No sports articles found…" without computing the requested title.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After fetching the articles, the agent’s final execute_python step (function-call-3656463218730225802) used a narrow keyword-based heuristic to detect sports articles and, finding none, returned "No sports articles found," instead of selecting the sports article with the longest description (which should be "The Rundown").
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
